title: element_mapping
description: Output contract for intermediate/element_mapping.json (Step 2). Consumed by Steps 2.5, 3, 5, 6, 7. See mellea-fy-map.md for the authoritative tag-to-primitive table, alternative rules (EXTRACT two-step, VALIDATE_OUTPUT executable-vs-LLM, CONVERSE three realisations, REMEDIATE three-entry expansion), and the TOOL_TEMPLATE provisional-routing rule that requires final_target_file == 'pending_step_2.5' until Step 2.5d amends.

format_version.description: Format version of this mapping document (e.g. '1.0').

mappings.description: Routing decisions in order. Count of mapping entries equals count of inventory entries plus expansions for two-step EXTRACT (-step1, -step2 suffixes) and three-entry REMEDIATE (modification + evaluation + loop wrapper).

element_id.description: Source element identifier from inventory.json. Suffixes: '-step1'/'-step2' for two-step EXTRACT expansions; '-mod'/'-eval'/'-loop' (or other suffixes per Step 2 convention) for REMEDIATE three-entry expansion. Cross-reference: every element_id (modulo suffix) MUST exist in inventory.json — not enforced by JSON Schema.

target_file.description: Initial routing target. For TOOL_TEMPLATE elements this is always 'tools.py' provisionally; Step 2.5d may move it to 'constrained_slots.py' or 'fixtures/mock_tools.py' (recorded in final_target_file).

target_symbol.description: Symbol name within target_file (function, class, slot, or module-level constant). NO_DECOMPOSE entries omit this only when paired with primitive == 'none'; otherwise required.

primitive.description: The Mellea primitive or Python construct mapped to. 'none' indicates a NO_DECOMPOSE element retained for invariant completeness.

primitive_details.description: Optional. Primitive-specific metadata (e.g. {format_schema, grounding_context_keys} for m.instruct). Open-shape map; consumers downstream destructure based on primitive.

final_target_file.description: Final routing target after Step 2.5d amendment. MUST be 'pending_step_2.5' for every TOOL_TEMPLATE entry until Step 2.5 runs. 'fixtures/mock_tools.py' is reachable only when disposition == 'mock'. Cross-reference invariant (not enforced by JSON Schema): no entry may retain 'pending_step_2.5' once Step 2.5 declares done.

step_2_confidence.description: Optional. Confidence score for the Step 2 routing decision.

step_2_rationale.description: Optional. One-line rationale for the routing decision (table row applied, override invoked, judgement call summary).

llm_judgement_required.description: Optional. True if Step 2 invoked an LLM judgement to make this routing decision. Such entries appear in the mapping report's Judgment Calls section (Step 6 §4).

dialect_override_applied.description: Optional. When non-null, identifies the dialect doc row that overrode the general tag-to-primitive table (e.g. 'crewai:agent-instructions-as-prefix'). MUST reference a real row in the detected runtime's dialect doc — not enforced by JSON Schema.

validation_kind.description: Required for VALIDATE_OUTPUT mappings: 'executable' (Requirement with validation_fn) or 'llm_judged' (bare Requirement(description=...)). Null otherwise.

target_file.description: One of the ten always-emitted or conditional package files. fixtures/mock_tools.py is permitted only via final_target_file when disposition == 'mock'.

primitive.description: The Mellea primitive or Python construct emitted at target_symbol. Values track mellea-fy-map.md tag-to-primitive table. 'none' is reserved for NO_DECOMPOSE entries.
